title: Correction Notice: Correlative Conventional and Super-resolution Photoactivated Localization Microscopy (PALM) Imaging to Characterize Chromatin Structure and Dynamics in Live Mammalian Cells
author: Dushyant Mehra
license_note: PMC full-text XML — Bio-protocol — CC-BY confirmed in article XML
steps_raw: After publishing the protocol ( https://bio-protocol.org/e4850 ), we noticed that the last name of the corresponding author was misspelled. It should be Puchner , not Pucher.
